memory:memory/2026-05-03.md:1:12.snippet: # 2026-05-03 ## OpenRouter Guardrails Setup - Sam wants minimal context sent to OpenRouter — no verbose output, no unnecessary file dumps. - Auto-fallback to free models on failure (429, unavailable, etc.). - Fallback order saved in TOOLS.md: Nemotron 3 Super → Qwen3 Next 80B → GPT-OSS 120B → Llama 3.3 70B → Gemma 3 27B → MiniMax M2.5 - Switch via `session_status(model="openrouter/...")` on failure. ## Notes - Confirmed current model: `openrouter/openrouter/owl-alpha` (1.0M context) - Free model limits: 20 req/min, 200 req/day each

memory:memory/2026-05-03.md:1:27.snippet: # 2026-05-03 ## OpenRouter Guardrails Setup - Sam wants minimal context sent to OpenRouter — no verbose output, no unnecessary file dumps. - Auto-fallback to free models on failure (429, unavailable, etc.). - Fallback order saved in TOOLS.md: Nemotron 3 Super → Qwen3 Next 80B → GPT-OSS 120B → Llama 3.3 70B → Gemma 3 27B → MiniMax M2.5 - Switch via `session_status(model="openrouter/...")` on failure. ## Notes - Confirmed current model: `openrouter/openrouter/owl-alpha` (1.0M context) - Free model limits: 20 req/min, 200 req/day each ## Lesson Learned - Got stuck in a loop trying to fix SearXNG 403 (bot detection + limiter.toml + formats config) — Sam never asked me to fix it. - **Rule: Max
